Ravinder was continously harrasing Monika because of lust in the want of a baby boy which was not fulfiled. Monika had undergone 4 miscarriages previously and all of them were of female babies, this had took a severe toll on her physical health. The family of Ravinder used to instigate Ravinder Kumar to beat her and commit atrocities upon her for not fulfiling their wish of a baby boy. Ravinder called for Monika and Ridhi to live with him in Assam and thereafter they went to Assam in the month of March 2022. Monika had informed The Assam Rifle Wife Welfare Association (ARWWA) president (W/) 39 ARCO0 in her Residence and informed about her continuous harassment. Then on 3rd September 2022, in the morning Monika and Ridhi were murdered by Ravinder Kumar. Monika was also pregnant at the time of the murder. Ravinder has committed cold blooded murder of three lives. Thus, we request you to initiate fair and transparent investigation by constituting SIT in this matter Against FIR No 2117 dt 3rd Sept 22, and the justice may be delivered.
